input.text: Create a system architecture diagram for a FastAPI-based authentication system using PostgreSQL.  The system should include the following components:  - Client (Web or Mobile) that sends HTTP requests - FastAPI backend server handling API requests - Authentication routes including /register, /login, and protected endpoints - Authentication service responsible for business logic - JWT token manager for generating and validating tokens - Password hashing module using bcrypt - Database access layer (ORM or SQL layer) - PostgreSQL database storing user data

elaborated.intent_summary: User requested: Create a system architecture diagram for a FastAPI-based authentication system using PostgreSQL.  The system should include the following components:  - Client (Web or Mobile) that sends HTTP requests - FastAPI backend server handling API requests - Authentication routes including /register, /login, and protected endpoints - Authentication service responsible for business logic - JWT token manager for generating and validating tokens - Password hashing module using bcrypt - Database access layer (ORM or SQL layer) - PostgreSQL database storing user data
elaborated.handoff_action: Pass normalized JSON to the downstream agent that calls MCP.
